exercises.code:
print('unit', 'entity_pair_at_t0')
print('target', 'needs_review_7d')
print('horizon', 7)

y=[0,1,0,0]
prev=sum(y)/len(y)
print('prevalence', prev)
print('n', len(y))
print('ok', True)

target='needs_review_7d'
print('fraud_free', 'fraud' not in target.lower())
print('target', target)
print('ok', True)

y=[1,1,0]
maj=1 if y.count(1)>=y.count(0) else 0
print('maj', maj)
print('dummy_acc', sum(yi==maj for yi in y)/len(y))
print('ok', True)

x,y=[0,1,1],[0,1,1]
pred=[1 if xi>=1 else 0 for xi in x]
acc=sum(p==t for p,t in zip(pred,y))/len(y)
print('acc', acc)
print('rule', 'x>=1')
print('ok', True)

fp,fn=2,1
print('cost', fp*1 + fn*5)
print('fp_w', 1, 'fn_w', 5)
print('ok', True)

import math
w,b,x=1,0,0.2
p=1/(1+math.exp(-(w*x+b)))
pred=1 if p>=0.5 else 0
print(round(p,3), pred)
print('thr', 0.5)
print('ok', True)

w=[1,2]
print(sum(wi*wi for wi in w))
print('L2', 'sum_w2')
print('ok', True)

coefs={'shared_phone':0.9,'amount_7d':0.3,'region_LIM':-0.1}
print(sorted(coefs, key=lambda k: abs(coefs[k]), reverse=True))
print('top', max(coefs, key=lambda k: abs(coefs[k])))
print('causal', False)

print(True)
print('scaled', True)
print('ok', True)

c=0.8
print('positive' if c>0 else 'negative')
print('coef', c)
print('causal', False)

X=[0.1,0.4]; thr=0.3
pred=[1 if x>=thr else 0 for x in X]
print(pred)
print('thr', thr)
print('model', 'stump')

preds=[[1,0,1],[1,1,0],[1,0,0]]
votes=[1,0,1]
maj=1 if votes.count(1)>=votes.count(0) else 0
print(maj)
print('votes', votes)
print('ok', True)

X,y=[0.1,0.6,0.9],[0,1,1]
stump=[1 if x>=0.5 else 0 for x in X]
maj=0 if y.count(0)>=y.count(1) else 1
s_acc=sum(p==t for p,t in zip(stump,y))/len(y)
d_acc=sum(t==maj for t in y)/len(y)
print(s_acc, d_acc)
print('beats_dummy', s_acc>=d_acc)
print('ok', True)

depth=[1,3,10]; valid_acc=[0.68,0.72,0.60]
i=max(range(3), key=lambda j: valid_acc[j])
print('best_depth', depth[i])
print('valid', valid_acc[i])
print('ok', True)

train,valid=0.99,0.60
overfit=(train-valid)>0.2
print(overfit)
print('gap', train-valid)
print('ok', True)

import random
random.seed(42)
print([random.randint(0,9) for _ in range(3)])
print('seed', 42)
print('ok', True)

import json
m={'pr_auc':0.61,'baseline_rule_pr_auc':0.55,'dummy_pr_auc':0.5}
print(json.dumps(m, sort_keys=True))
print('n_keys', len(m))
print('ok', True)

fields=['run_id','params','metrics','feature_set','data_cutoff']
print(fields)
print('n', len(fields))
print('ok', True)

model,dummy=0.62,0.5
print(model>dummy)
print('beats_dummy', model>dummy)
print('ok', True)

folds=[0.6,0.5,0.7]
print(round(sum(folds)/len(folds),3))
print('n_folds', len(folds))
print('ok', True)

slices={'A':1,'B':5,'C':2}
worst=max(slices, key=slices.get)
print(worst)
print('fn', slices[worst])
print('ok', True)

ents=['E1','E1','E2','E3']
print(len(set(ents)))
print('groups', sorted(set(ents)))
print('group_cv', True)
